name: Pineapple-Papaya-Mango Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the fruits and onion into small pieces.
2. Toss together in a bowl with lime juice.
3. To spice up salsa, add a dash of cayenne pepper or minced jalapeno pepper to taste.
This should be done about an hour before dinner to give a chance for the flavors to meld. It's a great way to liven up grilled or broiled meats, as well as fish and chicken.
